title: Google Finance Historical Prices Scraper
description: Fetch Google Finance historical price and volume data for one ticker symbol.

symbol.title: Symbol
symbol.description: Ticker symbol to fetch, such as AAPL, MSFT, TSLA, or VOO.

exchange.title: Exchange
exchange.description: Google Finance exchange code, such as NASDAQ, NYSE, NSE, LON, or TSE. Recommended to avoid symbol ambiguity.

range.title: Range
range.description: Preset time range. Use either this or both start_date and end_date.

start_date.title: Start Date
start_date.description: Custom range start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be used with end_date and without range.

end_date.title: End Date
end_date.description: Custom range end date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be used with start_date and without range.

hl.title: Language
hl.description: Google Finance language code, such as en, de, es, or zh-cn.

gl.title: Country
gl.description: Country code, such as us, gb, de, or ca.
